calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:40am
Small Claims appeals, Judge Pro Tem Robert Stump, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber.
Cause called for small claims appeals. No appearance by appellant Harry M. Estrado by 9:40am. Respondent Lourdes Puentes appears in Pro Per. Alexander Puentes, brother, appears with her. did not respond to roll call by 9:40am. Lourdes Puentes presents her case in the narrative.
9:45am
Matter is submitted. No evidence was marked or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Judgment Entered
